---
title: "IS428 <insert title>"
---

# Welcome to our Visual Analytics Project

Welcome! This website is a dedicated platform for **IS428 Visual Analytics for Business Intelligence**. Our team is...

## Our Mission
...

## Project Deliverables
Throughout this semester, we will be updating this site with:
* **Interactive Dashboards:** Visualizing scam frequencies and financial impacts.
* **Predictive Models:** Using time-series analysis to forecast future threats.
* **Methodology & Documentation:** Detailed walkthroughs of our data cleaning and design processes.

## Team Members
* **Choo Yi Ning** – School of Computing and Information Systems (SCIS)
* **Saanvi Madan** – School of Economics (SOE)

---
